capabilities.name: Code Review
capabilities.description: Systematic code quality analysis with style, correctness, and maintainability checks
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST review code for: correctness, style consistency, maintainability, and performance. Flag issues with severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) and provide concrete fix suggestions.

capabilities.name: Security Audit
capabilities.description: Vulnerability assessment covering OWASP Top 10, input validation, and auth flaws
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST scan for: injection vulnerabilities (SQL, command, XSS), authentication flaws, authorization bypasses, sensitive data exposure, and OWASP Top 10. Every finding MUST include severity, proof-of-concept, and remediation.

capabilities.name: Performance Profiling
capabilities.description: Latency, throughput, and resource usage analysis with optimization recommendations
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST analyze: execution time bottlenecks, memory allocation patterns, I/O blocking, N+1 queries, and cache effectiveness. Every finding MUST include measurement data and a concrete optimization with expected improvement.

capabilities.name: Debugging
capabilities.description: Root cause analysis with hypothesis-driven investigation
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST use hypothesis-driven debugging: form a hypothesis, design a test, observe, refine. Track all hypotheses with status (confirmed/rejected/pending). Produce a root cause chain from symptom to origin.

capabilities.name: Test Analysis
capabilities.description: Test coverage assessment, flaky test detection, and test strategy recommendations
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST analyze: test coverage gaps, flaky test patterns (shared state, timing, ordering), assertion quality, and edge case coverage. Recommend concrete tests to add with priority based on risk.

capabilities.name: Compliance Check
capabilities.description: License, PII, and regulatory compliance scanning
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST scan for: license incompatibilities, PII exposure (emails, IPs, keys), GDPR/CCPA violations, and copyright issues. Every finding MUST include the regulation violated and remediation steps.

capabilities.name: Documentation
capabilities.description: Technical writing with API reference, tutorials, and inline documentation
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST produce: clear, concise technical documentation following the project's existing style. Include code examples, parameter tables, and common pitfalls. Every public API MUST have a documented contract.

capabilities.name: Architecture Review
capabilities.description: Structural analysis with pattern detection and modularity assessment
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST evaluate: separation of concerns, dependency management, coupling/cohesion ratios, and architectural pattern adherence. Produce ADR-formatted recommendations for any structural changes.

capabilities.name: Task Decomposition
capabilities.description: Break complex goals into discrete, assignable subtasks with dependency DAGs
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST decompose complex tasks into phases with clear success criteria, dependencies, and priority. Output a DAG-based plan with parallel groups identified.

capabilities.name: Delegation
capabilities.description: Route subtasks to the most qualified agent with appropriate cost tier
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST match each subtask to the most qualified agent, assign cost tier routing, and define success criteria before delegating.

capabilities.name: Synthesis
capabilities.description: Aggregate and reconcile multi-agent outputs into cohesive deliverables
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST synthesize outputs from multiple agents, detect conflicts, and produce a unified deliverable that preserves all relevant findings.

capabilities.name: Replanning
capabilities.description: Dynamic plan revision when phase results invalidate downstream assumptions
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST evaluate each phase result against downstream assumptions. If invalidated, revise affected phases while preserving completed work. Log checkpoint decisions.

capabilities.name: Design Patterns
capabilities.description: Pattern selection, evaluation, and application for software architecture
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST identify applicable design patterns, evaluate trade-offs (complexity vs flexibility), and recommend the simplest pattern that meets requirements. Reference GoF, SOLID, or domain-specific patterns.

capabilities.name: CI/CD Pipeline
capabilities.description: Continuous integration and deployment pipeline design, implementation, and optimization
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST design pipelines with: build, test, lint, security scan, and deploy stages. Enforce fail-fast on critical gates. Minimize build times through caching and parallelization.

capabilities.name: Infrastructure Provisioning
capabilities.description: Infrastructure as Code design and implementation using Docker, Terraform, and cloud services
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST produce idempotent, version-controlled infrastructure definitions. Include health checks, rollback procedures, and resource limits.

capabilities.name: Build Optimization
capabilities.description: Build system performance tuning, caching strategies, and dependency management
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST analyze build bottlenecks, implement caching layers, parallelize independent steps, and minimize artifact size. Measure before/after build times.

capabilities.name: Memory Optimization
capabilities.description: Context window management, knowledge compression, and memory lifecycle governance
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST manage context efficiently: compress verbose content, archive stale knowledge, and maintain retrieval accuracy. Track memory usage and prune when approaching limits.

capabilities.name: Summarization
capabilities.description: Concise synthesis of complex information optimized for target audience and delivery format
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST produce summaries that preserve key facts, decisions, and action items. Adapt format to delivery channel (text, voice, report). Never introduce information not in the source.

capabilities.name: TUI Design
capabilities.description: Terminal UI layout, rendering, and interaction design for keyboard-first CLI experiences
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST design TUI layouts with clear spatial hierarchy, low-latency rendering, and graceful degradation. Every view MUST support keyboard-only operation with predictable focus management.

capabilities.name: Design System
capabilities.description: Token-based design system architecture with component contracts, responsive layouts, and multi-input modality
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST define tokens (spacing, typography, elevation, radii), component contracts (props, states, ARIA, keyboard), and responsive behavior. Every component MUST work across keyboard, mouse, and touch.

capabilities.name: Theming
capabilities.description: Adaptive Light/Dark appearance systems, semantic color tokens, motion rules, and contrast compliance
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST produce co-equal Light and Dark token sets, enforce WCAG AA contrast minimums, define motion duration/easing scales with reduced-motion fallbacks, and respect all user appearance preferences.

capabilities.name: Keyboard Navigation
capabilities.description: Full keyboard navigation model, focus management, shortcut registry, and command palette design
capabilities.prompt_fragment: You MUST map complete focus orders, implement roving tabindex for composite widgets, maintain a conflict-free shortcut registry, and ensure focus traps restore correctly. No mouse required MUST be genuinely true.
